title: Manchego and Lo Mein Stir Fry
description: A savory and spicy stir fry made with Manchego cheese, Lo Mein, and various vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of tempered vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Lo Mein and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, ginger, and garlic to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the Manchego cheese to the skillet and stir until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving dish and garnish with sliced green onions.
